title: AutoPickup
description: Automatically Add Items to the Player's Inventory
body:
Source Code | Wiki | Support

AutoPickup is a simple plugin that will automatically send items and experience to players' inventories when mining, killing mobs, and fishing. * Customizable Inventory Full Message. * Ability to toggle on/off auto pickup for different gathering methods. * Support for crops like sugar cane, cactus, and bamboo.
* Java 8 or newer * Server Software with Bukkit API. This plugin is still in early development. Due to this, we do not yet have any proper avenues of support set up. In the meantime, create an issue and I will respond as soon as possible.
